title: Hello everyone i want share something
author: PublicGuard224
selftext:
Me and my 2 friends bought expensive EA for fx trading and it's top EA in mql5 around 1999$.

Me and my friends doing trading from last 3 years we doing manual trading but now decided to go autotrade and we checked most expensive and top EA on mql5 and its name is "Quantum queen"  first we checked demo and did backtest it's crazy results and after we risked our money to buy and "Quantum queen" give me good profit on live trading it's around 22% to 25% monthly it's up and down according market conditions as we know
